zh.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward是Robert de Varde Sr和Alice Kemp的女兒，於1427年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾。她於1452年4月28日與Thomas Brereton在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年2月14日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可斯利享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward是Robert de Varde Sr和Alice Kemp的女儿，于1427年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾。她于1452年4月28日与Thomas Brereton在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年2月14日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可斯利享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

variants.name: Warshawsky
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Ari, Hyman.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Warsaw (Polish Warszawa), which became the capital of Poland at the end of the 16th century, after the destruction of Kraków by fire.
Americanized form of Polish Warszawski, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Wardman
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wardman, either in the general sense ‘watchman, guard’ (compare Ward ) or in the administrative sense ‘representative of a ward within a borough’.

variants.name: Warde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward was born in 1427, in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Robert de Varde Sr and Alice Kemp. She married Thomas Brereton on 28 April 1452, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 14 February 1498, in Blakesley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 71.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Wardは1427年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアッティシャルでRobert de Varde SrとAlice Kempの娘として生まれた。1452年4月28日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドでThomas Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年2月14日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラケスリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward(은)는 1427년 영국 노르섬프토실르 패티샤에서 Robert de Varde Sr(와)과 Alice Kemp의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1452년 4월 28일 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 Thomas Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 2월 14일 영국 노르섬프토실르 블레이케슬리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward nasceu em 1427, em Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Robert de Varde Sr e Alice Kemp. Ela casou-se com Thomas Brereton em 28 de abril de 1452, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1498, em Blakesley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lydia Ward родилась в 1427 г. в местности паттишолл, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert de Varde Sr и Alice Kemp. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brereton 28 апреля 1452 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 февраля 1498 г. в местности блеикесли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
